title: WOW Toys Danny's Diving Adventure,Blue/White,27.9 x 12.7 x 18.4 cm
description: From the manufacturer Make Bath Time Fun With Danny's Diving Adventure! The Super Cool Floating Speedboat from WOW Toys Get ready to dive in and make a splash with me, Danny’s Diving Adventure! Flip open the top of my boat to reveal a fantastic working diving board which Mandy and Chris, my diver friends, love to dive off into the bath. I also scoop up and pour water out of my mouth to add to the bath time fun! Daphne the dolphin likes to come along with us and can’t resist giving Mandy and Chis rides on her back! Interactive Toy Promotes Motor Skill and Imaginative Role Play Danny is designed with your little one in mind. The fun and bright colours, working diving board and removable figures encourage fine motor control practise for toddlers as well as inspires imaginative and creative role-play. At A Glance Scoop and pour floating bath boat with opening deck to reveal secret cabin Working diving board and removable figures No PVC, BPA and non-toxic paint* Mold resistant and dishwasher safe No batteries required Suitable for children aged 1 - 5 years. The WOW Toys Promise WOW has been responsibly designing and manufacturing toys for over two decades. Every toy is created with children in mind; no sharp edges or small parts and no PVC or toxic paint make them toys you can trust. How We Design Our unique toys are created in London by our team of specialist designers – old enough to understand exactly what makes a great toy, but young enough to remember the fun and magic of childhood. Why We Are Special WOW toys is a British company totally committed to innovation, design and quality in preschool toys for over two decades. Development Benefits WOW toys stimulate learning through long lasting creative play with exciting features to discover which help develop and feed young imaginations. From basic motor skills to more advanced social interactive role-play, the toys provide children with a fun way to make sense of the world around them and assist with early development. About WOW Nadim Ednan-Laperouse has always had a passion for toys. He launched WOW Toys at the 1997 London Toy Fair and though dwarfed by the international toy giants, WOW’s strong and clever designs soon caught the attention parents and children alike. Since then WOW has expanded and grown and is now available all over the UK and in over 50 countries around the world. WOW has had a clear mission right from the beginning, to design great quality toys with real long-lasting play value that did not require batteries. There would be no cutting corners and a focus on good design, safety and durability of the toys is the promise and vision of the brand for generations to come. In 2000 Nadim received his Honours at Buckingham Palace from HRH the Prince of Wales in recognition for his services to the toy industry and to overseas trade.
